Fields.Name: No Hit Distance
Fields.Description: Collision points above this distance [m] are judged as No Hit (less than 0: invalid)

Fields.Name: Include Collision Point of No Hit
Fields.Description: Do you include NoHit collision points?

Fields.Name: Include Outdoor Collision Point
Fields.Description: Do you include outdoor collision points?

Fields.Name: Include Floor Collision Point
Fields.Description: Do you include floor collision points?

Fields.Name: Evaluation Distance Calculation Type
Fields.Description: Evaluation distance calculation type (0: normal, average from 1: Max)

Fields.Name: Invalidate after Duration
Fields.Description: Collision points longer than this life [second] are treated as invalid. Set to be less than or equal to the life of the common setting

Fields.Name: Max Collision Point Count
Fields.Description: Max Number of collision point records

Fields.Name: Max Distance until Ignore
Fields.Description: Max distance decimation number (0: not decimation) (must be set to the value of Max collision point record number-1. Incorrect value will be corrected)
